body:
## Summary
- Reuse the existing generated review minimizer for rubrics reviews matching `## Rubrics Review`.
- Collapse prior rubrics PR comments before posting a new rubrics review through `post-response`.
- Document that `AGENT_COLLAPSE_OLD_REVIEWS` controls both review synthesis and rubrics review cleanup.

## Verification
- `npm --prefix .agent test`
- `npm --prefix .agent run build`

Closes #38

comments.body:
Sepo automation handoff dispatched: `implement` -> `review` (round 3/10).

agent planner selected review: Implementation succeeded and produced PR #57 for issue #38; an automated review is the appropriate next step before stopping.

<!-- sepo-agent-handoff state:dispatched created:1777524816099 base64:aGFuZG9mZjpzZWxmLWV2b2x2aW5nL3JlcG86MjUxNDc5NTk4NDg6aW1wbGVtZW50OjM4OnJldmlldzo1Nzoz -->

## Rubrics Review

| Total Score | Verdict | Rubrics Scored |
| -- | -- | -- |
| 100 | PASS | 6 |

| Dimension | Rubric | Result | Score | Evidence |
| -- | -- | -- | -- | -- |
| coding_workflow / generic | Read docs and linked context first | pass | 6/6 | Issue #38 references #11 and the prior plan called for reusing review minimization, matching `## Rubrics Review`, using `AGENT_COLLAPSE_OLD_REVIEWS`, warning on failure, and adding tests. The PR implements those points. |
| coding_workflow / generic | Reuse existing code | pass | 8/8 | `.agent/src/review-summary-minimize.ts` generalizes the existing minimizer with a `bodyMatcher` and adds `collapsePreviousRubricsReviews(...)`, preserving actor matching, pagination, duplicate filtering, and GraphQL minimization. |
| coding_workflow / generic | Make surgical changes | pass | 8/8 | The diff is limited to the posting/minimizer path, focused tests, rubrics workflow env wiring, and matching docs. No unrelated workflow or architecture churn. |
| coding_style / generic | Prefer simple implementations | pass | 7/7 | Rubrics detection is a small heading matcher, and `post-response.ts` mirrors the existing `post-comment.ts` collapse toggle/failure behavior without adding a separate subsystem. |
| coding_workflow / generic | Keep docs in sync | pass | 7/7 | `.agent/docs/architecture/supported-workflows.md` and `.agent/docs/customization/configuration-list.md` now describe that generated review cleanup covers both review synthesis and rubrics reviews. |
| coding_workflow / generic | Surface stateful failures | pass | 7/7 | `post-response.ts` warns when rubrics minimization fails and still posts the new review; `post-response-cli.test.ts` covers the failure path and disabled-toggle path. |

## Notes

- The strongest rubric drivers are that the PR reuses the existing #11 minimizer instead of building a parallel implementation, and it documents the shared `AGENT_COLLAPSE_OLD_REVIEWS` behavior.
- No rubric-specific follow-up needed.

## Findings

- **INFO:** No rubric violations found. The selected route/process rubrics around delegated authorization, preview contracts, merge strategy, and orchestration follow-up do not materially apply to this PR’s implementation surface.

## Final Rubric Verdict

PASS

## AI Review Synthesis

<!-- sepo-agent-review-synthesis -->

> Dual-agent review by **Claude** and **Codex**.
> Requested by @lolipopshock.

## Summary of PR/Issue
- PR #57 implements issue #38 by applying the existing old-review minimization pattern to rubrics review comments.
- It generalizes the generated review minimizer so rubrics reviews can be identified by the stable `## Rubrics Review` heading.
- It wires rubrics review posting through `post-response` to collapse older matching agent-authored comments, using the existing `AGENT_COLLAPSE_OLD_REVIEWS` toggle.
- The PR also updates the relevant `.agent` docs and adds focused regression coverage for minimization, failure tolerance, and disabled cleanup.

## Review
Both independent reviews found the change surgical, well-scoped, and aligned with the prior plan from issue #38. No actionable defects were identified.

| Issue | Severity | Description |
| -- | -- | -- |
| No actionable issues found | INFO | Reviewers agreed the PR reuses the existing minimization flow, preserves same-agent matching, keeps failures non-blocking, updates docs, and adds meaningful tests. |

## Progress
- Issue #38 already had an accepted implementation plan recommending reuse of the existing minimizer and the existing `AGENT_COLLAPSE_OLD_REVIEWS` flag.
- The posted rubrics review passed all selected rubrics with a 100/PASS score.
- The code review reported no actionable issues and noted that checks were passing.
- No existing inline comments were present, and no new inline comments were needed.

## Recommended Next Step
`NO_AUTOMATED_ACTION`: no unresolved actionable branch changes remain.

## Final Verdict
SHIP

## Action Items
- [ ] No required branch-change work.

## Rubrics Update

No changes were committed to `agent/rubrics` from PR #57.

no rubric changes

I found no trusted, durable user/team preference in PR #57’s conversation. The PR thread contains only bot-authored handoff/review comments, no human reviews or inline feedback. The linked issue #38 is a specific feature request about collapsing rubrics review comments, not a reusable rubric, and the reusable implementation lessons are already covered by existing rubrics like `reuse-existing-code`, `keep-docs-in-sync`, and `surface-stateful-failures`.

I left `/Users/shannon/projects/2604_sepo/repo/.agent/tools/local-runner/runner-3/_work/_temp/agent-rubrics` unchanged.

title: Collapse previous rubrics review comments
